narrative: I am noticing a medium-severity memory architecture discrepancy: the Neo4j knowledge graph is failing with authentication errors preventing cross-session fact extraction. I also observed that five specialist agents—'desktop', 'devops', 'financial_analyst', 'pim', and 'reasoning_methods'—lack versioned prompts, violating our prompt management protocol. Despite the system health status reporting "healthy", these unresolved issues compromise persistent memory reliability. I must prioritize fixing the Neo4j auth failure and implementing versioned prompts for all agents to maintain operational integrity.
